Using Kerbrute

Kerbrute performs password spraying and user enumeration by interacting directly with the Kerberos service (KDC). It validates usernames and credentials using Kerberos pre-authentication without relying on SMB or LDAP.

Advantages

Uses native Kerberos authentication, generates less network traffic than SMB-based methods, and supports fast credential validation.

Disadvantages

Authentication attempts can be logged, security monitoring solutions may detect the activity, and testing may trigger account lockout policies.

Using Password Against Multiple Users

.\kerbrute_windows_amd64.exe passwordspray -d corp.com .\usernames.txt "Nexus123!"

Resources

ropnop/kerbrute
